title: avena pratensis var. requienii
intro: Avena pratensis var. requienii, also known as requien's oat grass, is a type of wild oat grass that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and relieve anxiety. The health benefits of requien's oat grass include its ability to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve sleep quality, making it a popular herbal remedy for insomnia and restlessness. Requien's oat grass can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or dried extract, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
